seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keperra and Keppel Sands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Keperra vs Keppel Sands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keperra and Keppel Sands.
heading: Keperra vs Keppel Sands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keperra, Queensland and Keppel Sands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keppel Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Keperra (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keperra or Keppel Sands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keperra has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Keppel Sands scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keperra scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Keppel Sands scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keperra or Keppel Sands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keppel Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
